name: Freshservice
description: Freshservice — ITSM and service desk platform with REST API for automating ticket creation and IT asset management.

seo.title: Freshservice — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: Freshservice: Freshservice — ITSM and service desk platform with REST API for automating ticket creation and IT asset management.

when_to_use: Automate IT service tickets from monitoring alerts
Asset management integration with CI/CD deployments
Change management workflows for production releases
ITSM REST API for custom DevOps workflow automation

pros: Full ITSM with CMDB, asset and change management
REST API for ticket automation workflows
Modern UI vs legacy ITSM vendors
cons: Not really observability, it is ITSM
AI features lag Jira Service Management
Per-agent pricing grows quickly at scale
review.verdict: Strong mid-market ITSM that misses on ServiceNow-level customization; miscategorized as observability.
review.best_for: Mid-market IT teams replacing legacy ITSM with a modern SaaS workflow.
review.not_for: Engineering teams looking for APM, monitoring or DevOps observability.
